name: Product Page with Wishlist
subHeading: Display products and add them to a wishlist

learnings.title: Data Fetching
learnings.description: Fetched and displayed live API data using React Query.

learnings.title: State Management
learnings.description: Managed wishlist interactions using efficient local state updates.

learnings.title: UX States
learnings.description: Handled loading, error, and empty states for a smoother user experience.

learnings.title: Pagination
learnings.description: Implemented incremental load-more pagination for better usability.

learnings.title: UI System
learnings.description: Used Material UI components to build a clean and scalable interface.

name: Suggestion autocomplete search
subHeading: Typeahead search input with product suggestions

learnings.title: Data Fetching
learnings.description: Fetched product data with React Query and used local fallback data when the API fails.

learnings.title: Filtering Logic
learnings.description: Built client-side matching to surface relevant suggestions as the user types.

learnings.title: State Management
learnings.description: Tracked input value, filtered suggestions, and the selected suggestion with predictable local state.

learnings.title: UX Foundations
learnings.description: Created a clear “search → suggestions → selection details” flow for a typeahead experience.

learnings.title: UI System
learnings.description: Used Material UI components (TextField, Chip, Card) for a clean, reusable layout.
